source_refs.section: public-safe topic: chunk-ch1-fastapi-foundation  FastAPI development foundation Introduces FastAPI,

summary: Introduces FastAPI, Poetry-managed dependency isolation, Uvicorn execution, automatic API documentation, Docker/MySQL preparation, and the TIL service target.
title: FastAPI development foundation

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: chunk-ch2-clean-architecture  Clean architecture principles Defines architecture

summary: Defines architecture, explains why architecture matters, and frames clean architecture around separation of concerns, four layers, and inward dependency direction.
title: Clean architecture principles

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: chunk-ch3-signup-usecase  Signup use case and repository boundary Builds the use

summary: Builds the user signup flow with UserService, IUserRepository, UserRepository, password encryption, duplicate checks, and the first clean architecture boundary problems.
title: Signup use case and repository boundary

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: chunk-ch3-interface  Signup interface adapter Adds FastAPI APIRouter routes and

summary: Adds FastAPI APIRouter routes and Pydantic request models for the /users signup endpoint, then connects controller code to the application service.
title: Signup interface adapter

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: chunk-ch3-persistence  User persistence with SQLAlchemy and Alembic Implements i

summary: Implements infrastructure persistence with SQLAlchemy ORM, database configuration, Alembic migration setup, and a concrete UserRepository.
title: User persistence with SQLAlchemy and Alembic

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: chunk-ch4-dependency-injection  FastAPI dependency injection and layer risk Uses

summary: Uses FastAPI Depends to inject services and repositories, while calling out the clean architecture risk when framework APIs enter application-layer code.
title: FastAPI dependency injection and layer risk

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: chunk-ch5-user-crud  User resource CRUD and validation Extends user resources wi

summary: Extends user resources with update, list, delete, and validation behavior, including schema constraints and response shaping concerns.
title: User resource CRUD and validation

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: chunk-ch6-async  FastAPI async processing Introduces asynchronous programming an

summary: Introduces asynchronous programming and FastAPI async handling as a later runtime concern after the user resource foundation.
title: FastAPI async processing

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: chunk-ch7-login-jwt  Login with JWT authentication and authorization Covers JWT

summary: Covers JWT concepts, login flow, and authentication/authorization integration for protected API behavior.
title: Login with JWT authentication and authorization

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: chunk-dev-runtime-foundation  Development runtime foundation FastAPI 프로젝트의 초기 기반

summary: FastAPI 프로젝트의 초기 기반은 Poetry로 의존성을 고정하고, Uvicorn으로 ASGI 앱을 실행하며, Dockerized MySQL로 영속성 실습 환경을 분리하는 흐름이다.
title: Development runtime foundation

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: chunk-api-contract-boundaries  API contract boundaries 라우터, schema, 오류 응답, 목록 계약

summary: 라우터, schema, 오류 응답, 목록 계약을 하나의 외부 인터페이스 관점으로 묶은 topic index다.
title: API contract boundaries

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: chunk-application-usecase-flow  Application usecase flow 요청 의도를 유스케이스와 도메인 엔티티로

summary: 요청 의도를 유스케이스와 도메인 엔티티로 전달하는 application layer 흐름을 요약한다.
title: Application usecase flow

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: chunk-persistence-transaction-boundaries  Persistence and transaction boundaries

summary: SQLAlchemy 세션, repository, migration, transaction 책임을 영속성 경계로 정리한다.
title: Persistence and transaction boundaries

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: chunk-async-security-runtime  Async and security runtime 비동기 실행, 인증 의존성, passwor

summary: 비동기 실행, 인증 의존성, password hashing, secret 설정을 런타임 위험 관점으로 묶는다.
title: Async and security runtime

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: chunk-test-and-container-parity  Test and container parity API 테스트와 컨테이너 실행 기준을

summary: API 테스트와 컨테이너 실행 기준을 통해 로컬 개발과 검증 환경의 차이를 줄이는 관점을 제공한다.
title: Test and container parity
